prompt: A retired engineer invested $15,000 into a high-yield savings account. For the first 4 years, the account offered an annual compound interest rate of 6%. After this period, he decided to withdraw exactly one-third of the total accumulated amount to fund a project. The remaining balance continued to grow, but at a reduced annual compound interest rate of 4.5% for an additional 3 years. What is the final balance in the account to the nearest cent?
